hero.title: Empowering Farmers for a Sustainable Future
hero.subtitle: Join Kishan Seva Samiti to access exclusive benefits, sell organic products directly, and grow with a community dedicated to agricultural prosperity.

features.title: Membership Benefits
features.subtitle: Everything you need to grow your farming business

card.title: Official Farmer ID
card.desc: Get your digital and physical membership card with unique QR code.

market.title: Direct Marketplace
market.desc: Sell products like cow dung, fertilizers & seeds directly to buyers.

referral.title: Earn via Referrals
referral.desc: Invite other farmers and earn ₹7 instantly per successful registration.

cart.title: Your Basket
cart.empty_subtitle: Looks like you haven't added any organic produce yet.

footer.legal: © 2026 Kishan Seva Samiti. All rights reserved.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.login_prompt: Please login to place an order.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Access your farmer dashboard and manage your marketplace activities.
login.error_phone: Please enter a valid 10-digit mobile number.
login.error_creds: Invalid credentials. Please check your phone/email and password.

forgot.title: Reset Passcode
forgot.subtitle: Verify your mobile number to set a new secret passcode.
forgot.success_desc: Your passcode has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new code.

register.title: Join the Heritage
register.subtitle: By joining the Kishan Seva Samiti, you are not just registering for a service—you are becoming part of a prestigious community of farmers.
register.success_desc: Your membership is registered. Print your card and share your link to earn ₹7 per referral.
register.referral_link_label: Your Referral link (Earn ₹7 per sign up)
register.mobile_desc: Register with your mobile number to get started.
register.farming_desc: Details for your official membership card.
register.passcode_desc: Create a secure PIN/password to log in to your portal.
register.fee_desc: One-time fee to generate your Official Farmer ID Card.

errors.photo_size: Photo size must be less than 5MB
errors.invalid_otp: Invalid OTP code. Please try again.
errors.payment_cancelled: Payment was cancelled. Please try again to complete your membership.
errors.valid_name_phone: Please enter a valid full name and mobile number.
errors.phone_registered: This mobile number is already registered. Please login.
errors.otp_send_failed: Failed to send OTP. Please check your number and try again.

errors.payment_init_failed: Payment initiation failed. Please try again.
